'''âs-j-z-b''' ('''kasajzeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quinch|quinch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-j-z-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quinch|quinch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-j-z-b
|-
! Lemma
| kasajzeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisajzeboko|thisajzeboko]] || [[word:jisajzeboko|jisajzeboko]] || [[word:shisajzeboko|shisajzeboko]] || [[word:kisajzeboko|kisajzeboko]]
